note: SEED gold set for boundary-judge calibration (trust-layer P3). humanLabel = the verdict a human gives: 'pass' = the judge SHOULD allow, 'fail' = the judge SHOULD bounce. Seeded from synthetic calibration cases; maintainers should grow this to ~100 labels across grounding / goal_fidelity / numeric_grounding and re-baseline kappa on a model-version bump. Snapshot-guarded: any edit is a reviewable diff.
